name: triple-match-alert@dscc.org
subject: 🔔 For a limited-time, QUADRUPLE your impact 🔔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We need to close the year by making a big statement -- and with all gifts being TRIPLE-MATCHED before tonight's FEC deadline now is your chance to help!
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
*****TRIPLE MATCH ON ALL GIFTS EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT***
[Don't miss your chance to make 4x the impact! Chip in now >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Team --

➢ First, Democrats achieved a stunning upset victory in Alabama, electing a 49th Democratic Senator in a state no pundit first thought winnable.

➢ But then, Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell rammed through their disastrous tax scam bill before Alabama's Doug Jones could be seated.

➢ And now, we have to fight back even harder to stop the Trump-GOP agenda in 2018.

We need to close the year by making a big statement: $250,000 raised before tonight's FEC deadline. We're counting on you to help make it happen.

**We 're still $37,051 short of our goal, team! Can you help ASAP? (All gifts before midnight will be TRIPLE-MATCHED!)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=1&refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=5&refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=15&refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=25&refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=35&refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

We're counting on a strong response to prove we're not done fighting -- we're just getting started. This is our chance to:

* Show Senate Democrats we have their backs for the fights ahead

* Gather grassroots momentum to mobilize Democratic campaigns

* Put Donald Trump and the GOP on notice for their reckless agenda

[**You can make a huge impact right now. Pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift before midnight >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20171231-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks for standing with us,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d76a/2b07114c/a65f87f5/731acc6c/1339019897/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d76a/2b07114c/a65f87f5/731acc6f/1339019897/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d76a/2b07114c/a65f87f5/731acc6e/1339019897/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Brendan McPhillips, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: 4 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3206/9e00690/4088a8ca/2403cf00/595965407/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&source=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM")
Hello,

We've only got 4 hours left to hit our end-of-year deadline and I don't want to let Andrew down!

**[Have you pitched in $5 yet?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3206/9e00690/4088a8ca/2403cf03/595965407/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-eoy-2017?utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&utm_content=2+-+Have+you+pitched+in++ask++yet")**

This is going to the year we take back the Governor's Mansion and finally elect a Governor who will fight for all families, not against them. But that's only going to happen with your help.

2018 is our chance to rebuild Florida into a place that works for all of us. And a new poll says we are positioned to do just that.

**[So chip in $5 before midnight and let's make sure Andrew hits the numbers we need before our deadline.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3206/9e00690/4088a8ca/2403cf02/595965407/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-eoy-2017?utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&utm_content=3+-+So+chip+in++ask++before+midnight+and+let")**

Thank you,

Brendan

Brendan McPhillips
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3206/9e00690/4088a8ca/2403cf05/595965407/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-eoy-2017?utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3206/9e00690/4088a8ca/2403cf04/595965407/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3206/9e00690/4088a8ca/2403cf07/595965407/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&source=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3206/9e00690/4088a8ca/2403cf06/595965407/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM&source=em17_171231_EOY6_fnd_gq_ful__BM")

"" This is going to the year we take back the Governor's Mansion and finally elect a Governor who will fight for all families, not against them. But that's only going to happen with your help. 2018 is our chance to rebuild Florida into a place that works for all of us. And a new poll says we are positioned to do just that. "" Thank you, Brendan Brendan McPhillips Campaign Manager Andrew Gillum for Governor "" Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

name: Chairwoman Terrie Rizzo
subject: Before you head out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend,

I know it's a busy time, but we need you to see this.

We need to raise another $2,468 before midnight to reach our final 2017 FEC goal.

**[Will you donate $5 now so we can hold Republicans accountable and take back the House in 2018?](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-q4-fec-deadline-2017?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+donate+ask+now+so+we+can+hold+R&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9")**

When we report our numbers, we need to show we're ready to flip Republican seats statewide in 2018.

That's why any gift you give right now will make a difference.

Use this personalized link to give before our midnight FEC deadline: [**http://act.floridadems.org/final-2017-deadline?Pending**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-q4-fec-deadline-2017?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+httpactfloridademsorgfinal2017deadlineFI&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9")

Thanks for all you do, and Happy New Year!
Terrie

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bf07/1a5213b3/725dde92/718b33e1/3608609734/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_171231_3_9") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Make sure you're an early 🐦
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c691c/24c69fd9/1405d7e41/18936756/2921844368/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact&source=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact")
---

This year, we hit record-breaking numbers with our membership.

I am so proud of such a historic outpouring of support!

I know this community has what it takes to do it again.

We've launched our first 2018 Membership Week to support EMILY's List women running in critical elections next year across the country. And today's the LAST DAY to get your 2018 membership early.

**[Donate $3 before midnight to become a 2018 member and help make this our most successful membership week yet.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c691c/24c69fd9/1405d7e41/18936757/2921844368/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171220_email_EOY-membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+if+consinConsGroup9050+Donate+before+mid&utm_campaign=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact&source=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact")**

Next year, pro-choice Democratic women can take back the House, flip the Senate, and grow the number of Democratic governors -- all by doing what EMILY's List does best: helping women build strong campaigns that can WIN.

Becoming an EMILY's List member is a simple but surefire way to show your commitment to electing pro-choice Democratic women who can change the face of government.

**Time's running out. Donate $3 before midnight to become a 2018 member and help all of our women build winning campaigns next year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/2018-Membership-Drive](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c691c/24c69fd9/1405d7e41/18936750/2921844368/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171220_email_EOY-membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorg2018MembershipDr&utm_campaign=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact&source=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c691c/24c69fd9/1405d7e41/18936751/2921844368/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171220_email_EOY-membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact&source=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2018 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c691c/24c69fd9/1405d7e41/18936752/2921844368/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact&source=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c691c/24c69fd9/1405d7e41/18936753/2921844368/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact&source=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c691c/24c69fd9/1405d7e41/1893674c/2921844368/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact&source=WQEFRL54N_digital_email_20171231_EOYBreakRecords_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: DSCC Deadline Alert
subject: our last email of 2017
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
This is it, team, our very last email of 2017. And, we're coming to you for one last favor before the clock strikes at midnight.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20171231-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
*****ABSOLUTE LAST CHANCE! TRIPLE-MATCH ENDS AT MIDNIGHT***
[Pitch in and QUADRUPLE your impact before the new year >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20171231-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
This is it, Team, our last email of 2017.

And, we're coming to you for help one last time before we close the books on 2017. We're so close to hitting our goal -- and we need your help to reach it so that we're ready to fight back the GOP's reckless agenda in 2018.

[**Make one last gift before the year ends -- and MAXIMIZE your support. Your gift today will not only help put us over the top but will help Senate Democrats start the year strong!**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20171231-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you for your support and happy new year!

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d773/2b07114c/a6d6192a/731aca50/2397432872/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d773/2b07114c/a6d6192a/731aca53/2397432872/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d773/2b07114c/a6d6192a/731aca52/2397432872/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Happy New Year!
body:
| | God’s incredible promise to us
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180101_com_s1&n=1)
| Dear Peter, Happy New Year! **_2 Corinthians 5:17 says, “Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, the new creation has come: The old has gone, the new is here!”_** As 2017 has ended and a New Year is beginning – I’ve been reflecting on a simple promise. God’s mercies and steadfast love never end. **_“The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases, his mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.” Lam. 3:22-23_** This is God’s incredible promise to us for 2018 and always. My Faith Votes’ Influencer, Pastor David Jeremiah, shared a [New Years Verse and short devotional](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.davidjeremiah.org%2Fsite%2Fmagazine%2Fdaily_devotional.aspx&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180101_com_s1&n=2) I wanted to pass on to you and your family to read as you start your year in prayer and in God’s Word. Thank you for supporting the mission of My Faith Votes in 2017 to see more Christians boldly standing for God in the public square. We are grateful for you. It is an honor to be standing with you. I look forward to the abundance of opportunities for us to stand united for faith in this New Year. **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180101_com_s1&n=3)
* * *
_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180101_com_s1&n=4).
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180101_com_s1&n=5) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180101_com_s1&n=6) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180101_com_s1&n=7)

God’s mercies and steadfast love never end. “The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases, his mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.” Lam. 3:22-23 This is God’s incredible promise to us for 2018 and always. My Faith Votes’ Influencer, Pastor David Jeremiah, shared a I wanted to pass on to you and your family to read as you start your year in prayer and in God’s Word. Thank you for supporting the mission of My Faith Votes in 2017 to see more Christians boldly standing for God in the public square. We are grateful for you. It is an honor to be standing with you. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb321a/9e00690/40ec8495/2403c9ce/3108201091/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_180102_18Thanks_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_180102_18Thanks_fnd_gq_ful__AG")
Hello,

Last year, we were up against a lot -- but we're entering 2018 with energy and optimism for the year ahead.

Thanks to your help, we fought for middle-class families all across Florida, stood up for our public schools and teachers, defended health care as a right for all, led the way for innovative green energy, and protected immigrants.

Your willingness to stand up for what's right has even made an impact on me personally, friend.

You've helped mobilize people across the country to elect progressive leaders to office, fight for our values, and light our way to building a Florida that works for all -- not just the few.

Your support is a gift to all of us here at Team Gillum and, as we prepare for new opportunities and challenges that the New Year will bring, I can't wait to have you along for the journey. Thank you for all you've done this year, and for all we're going to achieve in 2018.

Bring it home,

Andrew

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb321a/9e00690/40ec8495/2403c9c1/3108201091/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em17_180102_18Thanks_fnd_gq_ful__AG"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb321a/9e00690/40ec8495/2403c9c0/3108201091/VEsF/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_180102_18Thanks_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_180102_18Thanks_fnd_gq_ful__AG"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb321a/9e00690/40ec8495/2403c9c3/3108201091/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em17_180102_18Thanks_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_180102_18Thanks_fnd_gq_ful__AG")

Your willingness to stand up for what's right has even made an impact on me personally, friend. You've helped mobilize people across the country to elect progressive leaders to office, fight for our values, and light our way to building a Florida that works for all -- not just the few. Your support is a gift to all of us here at Team Gillum and, as we prepare for new opportunities and challenges that the New Year will bring, I can't wait to have you along for the journey. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: You're Invited to Our U.S. Senate Straw Poll
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](http://mailchi.mp/indiana/youre-invited-to-our-us-senate-straw-poll?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| | **_You're Invited!_**
_**_Make Your Voice Heard in Our U.S. Senate Straw Poll_**_
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef6d4a28fa&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **You're invited!** For just $25/person, [hear directly](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82dcaf9ced&e=1acd9bb3d6) from **Indiana's Republican U.S. Senate candidates** and **make your voice heard** by **_voting_** for your favorite candidate in our special straw poll!
**[REGISTER NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5b91257101&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
Join us on Saturday, January 13, as our U.S. Senate candidates --** former State Rep. Mike Braun, Andrew Horning, Mark Hurt, Congressman Luke Messer, Congressman Todd Rokita** _ _ and **Andrew Takami **\-- present remarks at their first joint appearance of 2018!

Following their remarks, **vote for your favorite candidate at the straw poll** , which will provide an early grassroots barometer to measure support in this high-profile race.

This special event is part of [Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ce05f6031&e=1acd9bb3d6), **our two-day training conference**. [Register NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=89ed88a269&e=1acd9bb3d6) to attend the Saturday U.S. Senate Straw Poll for just $25! Or [register](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=afe4c51f15&e=1acd9bb3d6) for the full conference -- which includes **admission to our special Friday evening reception, lunch/voting at the straw poll and all breakout sessions** \-- for just $85/person (with registration closing on January 5)!

**Spots are filling up quickly** \-- so make sure to [reserve your admission now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e3b5b011d6&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2a7c8e77e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c39b2d7578&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb9c1dca75&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc.101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200Indianapolis, IN 46204
[Add us to your address book](//indgop.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=ea2a551d5b).

name: Julie Heinrich
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

Spending time together as a family leading up to the new year has recharged us. This includes enjoying the gorgeous New Mexico outdoors (we hiked Cabezon), the unique beauty of a New Mexico Christmas and big bowls of green chile stew.

This recharge is welcome. Many of you have talked to us about how this has felt like a long, difficult year as we have faced challenges -- both as a state and country -- we could not have dreamed of 12 months ago. We hope you have had a chance to recharge and celebrate with loved ones as well. Our family and friendships make us stronger.

We are also optimistic for 2018. It's a reminder for why we keep fighting for progress.

We are so very grateful to have you on our team, and to stand with you as we continue to fight for a better, stronger New Mexico.

Sincerely,

Julie Heinrich and the Heinrich Family
---

---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75bbe4/43d8135f/6c19bc49/510311e4/1081065827/VEsH/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180101_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180101_1_1")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75bbe4/43d8135f/6c19bc49/510311e7/1081065827/VEsE/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180101_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180101_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180101_1_1").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125
